template:
defmodule Solution do
  @doc """
  Extracts width and height from a PNG binary header.
  Returns {width, height}.
  """
  def extract_dimensions(png_binary) do
    # PNG signature (8 bytes) + chunk length (4 bytes) + [[SLOT ihdr]] (4 bytes) = 16 bytes offset
    # Then width (4 bytes) and height (4 bytes)
    <<_signature::[[SLOT sig_size]],
      [[SLOT chunk_decl]],
      "IHDR",
      [[SLOT width_decl]],
      height::unsigned-big-integer-size(32),
      _rest::binary>> = png_binary
    
    {width, height}
  end
end
prompt: Pick the binary annotations for the PNG header chunks.
